[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0100100111 5
1 1010010001 4
2 1100101001 5
3 1011110111 8
4 1111111110 9
5 1111011111 9
6 0101001111 6
7 1110100111 7
